stories.title: Russia fires nearly 400 drones at Ukraine with signs its spring offensive has started
stories.summary: Russia launched nearly 400 drones at Ukraine in what appears to be the start of its spring offensive, hitting residential areas in Zaporizhzhia.

stories.title: Senate confirms Sen. Mullin as DHS secretary. And, Iran denies U.S. talks to end war
stories.summary: Senate confirmed Markwayne Mullin as DHS Secretary while Iran denied ongoing talks with the US to end the war now in its fourth week.

stories.title: Iran fires more missiles at Israel, dismisses Trump's talk as 'fake news'
stories.summary: Iran fired missiles at four Israeli sites including central Tel Aviv, injuring at least six people, while a gas line in southwest Iran was also struck overnight.

stories.title: Kim vows to 'irreversibly' cement North Korea's nuclear status
stories.summary: Kim Jong Un vowed to 'irreversibly' cement North Korea's nuclear status, calling the country's rapid weapons expansion the 'right' choice.

stories.title: Amazon says AWS Bahrain region ‘disrupted’ following drone activity
stories.summary: Amazon's AWS Bahrain region was disrupted by drone activity for the second time this month due to the Iran war.

stories.title: Pakistan’s army chief attempts to broker Iran peace talks in call with Trump
stories.summary: Pakistan's army chief Asim Munir attempted to broker Iran-US peace talks in a call with Trump, with negotiations possibly starting next week in Islamabad.

stories.title: Asia boosts coal use as Iran war squeezes global LNG supplies
stories.summary: Asian countries are boosting coal use as the Iran war squeezes global LNG supplies, worsening air pollution concerns.

stories.title: Iran says no talks with US, calls Trump statements a ‘bluff’
stories.summary: Iranian officials dismissed Trump's peace talk claims as a 'bluff,' denying any direct or indirect negotiations with the US.

stories.title: Israel kills three in Beirut as it intensifies attacks across Lebanon
stories.summary: Israel killed three people in Beirut while intensifying attacks across Lebanon, where over one million people are displaced.

stories.title: Airstrikes may have destroyed Iran's last F-14s, ending a long, strange saga
stories.summary: Airstrikes may have destroyed Iran's last F-14 Tomcats, ending the strange saga of US-built planes Iran kept flying for decades despite sanctions.

stories.title: Deadly air attack hits pro-Iran Popular Mobilisation Forces in Iraq
stories.summary: A deadly airstrike hit pro-Iran Popular Mobilisation Forces headquarters in Iraq's Anbar province.

stories.title: Denmark votes in an early election that follows a crisis over US designs on Greenland
stories.summary: Denmark held early elections following a crisis over US designs on Greenland.

stories.title: Top EU official calls for negotiations with Iran and an end to war
stories.summary: European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen called for negotiations with Iran and an end to hostilities.

stories.title: Large oil refinery explosion near Texas coast forces residents to shelter in place
stories.summary: A large explosion at a Valero oil refinery near Port Arthur, Texas forced residents to shelter in place.

stories.title: Asian shares mostly rebound after Trump hints at a possible end to the Iran war
stories.summary: Asian shares rebounded after Trump hinted at a possible end to the Iran war, though Iran denies any talks are happening.
